{{8TeamBracket-Tennis3
|RD1=Quarterfinals
|RD2=Semifinals
|RD3=Final
|RD1-team1={{flagicon|JPN}} [[Naomi Osaka]]
|RD1-score1-1=6<sup>4</sup>
|RD1-score1-2=4
|RD1-team2='''{{flagicon|CZE}} [[Karolína Muchová]]'''
|RD1-score2-1='''7<sup>7</sup>'''
|RD1-score2-2='''6'''
|RD1-team3='''{{flagicon|UKR}} [[Marta Kostyuk]]'''
|RD1-score3-1='''6'''
|RD1-score3-2='''6'''
|RD1-team4={{flagicon|ITA}} [[Jasmine Paolini]]
|RD1-score4-1=3
|RD1-score4-2=2
}}
